creator: spambox@haruhiism.net
text:
Unbound 1.8.0 fails to build using poudriere: 

./configure: 16926: Syntax error: word unexpected (expecting ")")
===>  Script "configure" failed unexpectedly.

Detailed log: https://poudriere.koumakan.jp/data/11amd64-default/2018-09-21_05h41m20s/logs/errors/unbound-1.8.0.log
